title: District Work Based Learning Specialist
status: Full Time, 1 FTE (40 hours per week); a 182 day calendar with an additional contract for an extra 32 days (total 214 days)Minimum Requirements:Bachelor's Degree and a minimum of 3 years' industry and/or school-to-work related experience. connected to student internship and industry advisory committees.  Must have a valid Utah Secondary Teaching License.  Must have and maintain an active Utah Driver's License.The salary for this position is assigned to the lane 5 of the ES Salary Schedule.The salary information listed is for the 182 contract days and does not include the additional compensation for the extra 32 contract days.To view the salary schedule, please select the following linkES Salary Schedule.Attachment(s):District Work Based Learning Specialist.pdfEmail To A FriendPrint Version
